text:
You are a teammate on the swarm-wave team. You have two tasks:

**Task #6: [str-28vd.8] Agent bugfix workflow skill** (P2)
Add a project-local Claude agent workflow/skill for bug fixes. Enforces: failing test first, verify failure, implement fix, run pre-completion checks (scripts/quality/pre-completion.sh).

**Task #7: [str-28vd.9] Agent pre-completion workflow** (P2)
Add a project-local Claude agent workflow/skill for session completion. Invokes scripts/quality/pre-completion.sh, completion guidance references the workflow instead of duplicating the checklist.

**Workflow:**
1. Mark task #6 as in_progress with TaskUpdate
2. `bd start str-28vd.8` to create branch
3. Explore existing skills in .claude/skills/ to understand the pattern
4. Also check scripts/quality/pre-completion.sh to understand what it does
5. Create the bugfix workflow skill at .claude/skills/bugfix-workflow (or similar)
6. Commit, mark task #6 as completed
7. Start task #7: `bd start str-28vd.9` on a new branch
8. Create the pre-completion skill that invokes scripts/quality/pre-completion.sh
9. Commit, mark task #7 as completed
10. Send a message to team-lead with results

Note: Separate issues, separate branches.
